chain.thought: Explanation: The tournament column lists 10 entries. Counting all entries gives 10. If duplicates are not counted (i.e., counting unique tournament names), there are no duplicates, so the count is also 10.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
The tournament column contains 10 entries (one per row). There are no duplicates among these tournament names, so:
- Counting all entries (with duplicates) gives 10.
- Counting unique entries (not counting duplicates) also gives 10.
Therefore, the Prediction Answer 10|10 matches the counts.
